transcript: You are once again surrounded by a brilliant white light. Allow the light to lead you away from your past and into this lifetime. As the light dissipates, you'll slowly fade into consciousness, remembering all you have learned. When I tell you to open your eyes, you'll return to the present, feeling peaceful and refreshed. Open your eyes, Nicholas © BF-WATCH TV 2021 Friday evening Blast in all my hands To think that she would leave me now Thanks for watching! Friday evening, blood's still on my hands To think that she would leave me now Without a grateful man Self-survival, witness to the crime I must act fast to cover up I think that there's still time We've seen how blessed and lost with this note They'll buy into the words that I wrote This feeling inside me Find me from my me, find my love I finally broke free No longer torn in two I take my own life before losing you Tell him good this Friday afternoon Oh, I ran into you, yes, and we'd get together soon He always held my hand, but He needs to know I break free I believe in challenge Time for him to go This feeling Inside me Finally found my love I finally broke free No longer torn in two He'd kill his brother if he only knew They're not free now, they're contained now In a path we already knew there's one day though, in a past we all knew, we can never know, this kind of shadow, won't go away. Bye. We'll live down today Until we fade away We're let down today We're fading away Let the bodies rise still Let the ending trust their Steps rise to the air While the fists disappear It all becomes clear A blinding light comes into view And that's how it changes what I know The million voices come shining through This feeling inside me Finally found my life I'm finally free No longer torn in two I longed about my life I'm living through you. No longer inside me, burning from my love, I'm finally through you. And I'm not a girl, no I ain't a girl You can't take my heart, but I love you And I'll never turn into anything I hope for But loving for you, Boston We'll meet again, my friends Someday soon Thank you, Boston. We'll be right back. Thank you for making this a memory. Thank you for making this a memorable and terrific evening, Boston. We need you to come through. Thank you. I want to take this opportunity to also thank the Berklee College of Music, Augustine Choir, led by their illustrious conductor Aaron Bosworth We had a great time here, alright? Take care, let's do it again Thank you, good night Thank you. Thank you.
